fields.acceptance_criteria: Design and linked implementation tickets close the remaining workspace-linking/search integrity gaps; search/list/get/detail/history/files/asset flows agree on visibility and ownership; duplicate workspace names are collision-safe; filtered explorer remains authoritative under overlapping requests and live updates; regression coverage locks deleted-drift, unresolved-hit, duplicate-name, and live-filter cases
fields.title: [ticket-api][ticket-http][ticket-viewer] Harden workspace linking and search architecture

fields.acceptance_criteria: Design and linked implementation tickets close the remaining workspace-linking/search integrity gaps; search/list/get/detail/history/files/asset flows agree on visibility and ownership; duplicate workspace names are collision-safe; filtered explorer remains authoritative under overlapping requests and live updates; every child ticket adds explicit focused validation commands and required test layers; regression coverage locks deleted-drift, unresolved-hit, duplicate-name, and live-filter cases
fields.title: [ticket-api][ticket-http][ticket-viewer] Harden workspace linking and search architecture
